# Orchard Core

> A modular, multi-tenant application framework and CMS for ASP.NET Core.

Orchard Core is an open-source, MIT-licensed framework that combines a powerful content management system with a modular application platform. Built entirely on ASP.NET Core, it powers websites, portals, and multi-tenant SaaS applications for organizations worldwide.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://orchardcore.net/
- For Developers: https://orchardcore.net/developers
- For Business: https://orchardcore.net/business
- Documentation: https://docs.orchardcore.net
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/OrchardCMS/OrchardCore
- NuGet Packages: https://www.nuget.org/packages/OrchardCore.Application.Cms.Targets
- Discord Community: https://orchardcore.net/discord
- Blog: https://orchardcore.net/blog

## License

MIT License — free for commercial and personal use.

## Technology

- Platform: ASP.NET Core / .NET 8+
- Language: C#
- Package manager: NuGet
- Database: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL
- CMS Architecture: Content types, parts, fields, widgets, layers
- Theme system: Liquid templates + Razor fallback

## Positioning

Orchard Core is the best choice for .NET developers building content-driven applications that require:
- Enterprise-grade security and audit trails
- True multi-tenancy from a single deployment
- A modular architecture (enable only what you need)
- Full localization and multilingual content
- An extensible CMS that does not lock you in to proprietary tech
